top.title: Flight paths squeezed as Iran conflict closes more airspace
top.summary: A drone attack on Azerbaijan has narrowed choices for airlines scrambling to respond to disruption in the Gulf.

top.title: Armed robots take to the battlefield in Ukraine war
top.summary: Ukraine has embarked on a programme to deploy armed robots on the battlefield against Russian forces.

top.title: Israel strikes Beirut after evacuation warning sparks panic
top.summary: Huge traffic jams form after the unprecedented warning for people to leave the Hezbollah stronghold, as Israel steps up its strikes across Lebanon.

top.title: TfL hack in 2024 affected around 10 million people, BBC can reveal
top.summary: TfL insists it has "kept customers informed throughout this incident and will continue to take all necessary action".

top.title: Anthropic vows to sue Pentagon over supply chain risk label
top.summary: The supply chain risk designation of the artificial intelligence firm is a first for a US company.

top.title: Xbox confirms new console is coming - but can it revive the brand?
top.summary: Microsoft is the first big company out of the gates with Project Helix - a "next-generation" console.
